1701: export async function handleListWorkspaceFiles(
1702:   workspaceId: string,
1703:   request: Request,
1704:   env: Env
1705: ): Promise<Response> {
1706:   try {
1707:     const workspace = await resolveWorkspaceOr404(env, workspaceId);
1708:     if (!workspace) {
1709:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace not found' }, 404);
1710:     }
1711:     if (workspace.status !== 'ready') {
1712:       return workspaceNotReadyResponse(workspace);
1713:     }
1714: 
1715:     const url = new URL(request.url);
1716:     const requestedPath = normalizeWorkspacePath(url.searchParams.get('path'));
1717:     const sandbox = await getWorkspaceSandbox(env, workspace.sandboxId);
1718: 
1719:     const pathCheck = await executeSandboxCommand(
1720:       sandbox,
1721:       `cd ${shellQuote(WORKSPACE_ROOT)} && test -d ${shellQuote(requestedPath)}`
1722:     );
1723: 
1724:     if (pathCheck.exitCode !== 0) {
1725:       const rootCheck = await executeSandboxCommand(sandbox, `test -d ${shellQuote(WORKSPACE_ROOT)}`);
1726:       if (rootCheck.exitCode !== 0) {
1727:         throw new Error('Workspace root is unavailable in sandbox');
1728:       }
1729: 
1730:       return jsonResponse({ error: `Directory not found: ${requestedPath}` }, 404);
1731:     }
1732: 
1733:     const resolvedPath = await resolveWorkspaceRealPath(sandbox, requestedPath);
1734:     assertWorkspaceRootSafe(resolvedPath);
1735: 
1736:     const output = await runSandboxCommandWithOutput(
1737:       sandbox,
1738:       `cd ${shellQuote(WORKSPACE_ROOT)} && dir=${shellQuote(requestedPath)}; set -- "$dir"/* "$dir"/.[!.]* "$dir"/..?*; for entry in "$@"; do [ -e "$entry" ] || continue; name=\${entry##*/}; case "$name" in '.'|'..') continue ;; esac; if [ -d "$entry" ]; then kind='directory'; else kind='file'; fi; printf '%s\\0%s\\0' "$name" "$kind"; done`
1739:     );
1740: 
1741:     const entries = parseWorkspaceListEntries(output, requestedPath);
1742: 
1743:     return jsonResponse({
1744:       workspaceId,
1745:       path: requestedPath,
1746:       entries,
1747:     });
1748:   } catch (error) {
1749:     if (isWorkspacePathValidationError(error)) {
1750:       return jsonResponse({ error: (error as Error).message }, 400);
1751:     }
1752: 
1753:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
1754:     return jsonResponse({ error: message }, 500);
1755:   }
1756: }

1758: export async function handleGetWorkspaceFile(
1759:   workspaceId: string,
1760:   request: Request,
1761:   env: Env
1762: ): Promise<Response> {
1763:   try {
1764:     const workspace = await resolveWorkspaceOr404(env, workspaceId);
1765:     if (!workspace) {
1766:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace not found' }, 404);
1767:     }
1768:     if (workspace.status !== 'ready') {
1769:       return workspaceNotReadyResponse(workspace);
1770:     }
1771: 
1772:     const url = new URL(request.url);
1773:     const filePath = normalizeWorkspacePath(url.searchParams.get('path'), true);
1774:     const maxBytes = parseMaxBytes(url, 'max_bytes', DEFAULT_FILE_READ_MAX_BYTES, MAX_FILE_READ_MAX_BYTES);
1775:     const sandbox = await getWorkspaceSandbox(env, workspace.sandboxId);
1776: 
1777:     const exists = await executeSandboxCommand(
1778:       sandbox,
1779:       `cd ${shellQuote(WORKSPACE_ROOT)} && test -f ${shellQuote(filePath)}`
1780:     );
1781:     if (exists.exitCode !== 0) {
1782:       const rootCheck = await executeSandboxCommand(sandbox, `test -d ${shellQuote(WORKSPACE_ROOT)}`);
1783:       if (rootCheck.exitCode !== 0) {
1784:         throw new Error('Workspace root is unavailable in sandbox');
1785:       }
1786: 
1787:       return jsonResponse({ error: `File not found: ${filePath}` }, 404);
1788:     }
1789: 
1790:     const resolvedPath = await resolveWorkspaceRealPath(sandbox, filePath);
1791:     assertWorkspaceRootSafe(resolvedPath);
1792: 
1793:     const sizeOutput = await runSandboxCommandWithOutput(
1794:       sandbox,
1795:       `cd ${shellQuote(WORKSPACE_ROOT)} && wc -c -- ${shellQuote(filePath)}`
1796:     );
1797:     const sizeBytes = Number(sizeOutput.trim().split(/\s+/)[0]);
1798:     const content = await runSandboxCommandWithOutput(
1799:       sandbox,
1800:       `cd ${shellQuote(WORKSPACE_ROOT)} && head -c ${maxBytes} -- ${shellQuote(filePath)}`
1801:     );
1802: 
1803:     return jsonResponse({
1804:       workspaceId,
1805:       path: filePath,
1806:       sizeBytes: Number.isFinite(sizeBytes) ? sizeBytes : null,
1807:       maxBytes,
1808:       truncated: Number.isFinite(sizeBytes) ? sizeBytes > maxBytes : false,
1809:       content,
1810:     });
1811:   } catch (error) {
1812:     if (isWorkspacePathValidationError(error)) {
1813:       return jsonResponse({ error: (error as Error).message }, 400);
1814:     }
1815: 
1816:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
1817:     return jsonResponse({ error: message }, 500);
1818:   }
1819: }

1821: export async function handleGetWorkspaceDiff(
1822:   workspaceId: string,
1823:   request: Request,
1824:   env: Env
1825: ): Promise<Response> {
1826:   try {
1827:     const workspace = await resolveWorkspaceOr404(env, workspaceId);
1828:     if (!workspace) {
1829:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace not found' }, 404);
1830:     }
1831:     if (workspace.status !== 'ready') {
1832:       return workspaceNotReadyResponse(workspace);
1833:     }
1834:     if (!workspace.baselineReady) {
1835:       return jsonResponse(
1836:         {
1837:           error: 'Workspace baseline is not ready. Run workspace reset to retry baseline initialization.',
1838:           status: workspace.status,
1839:         },
1840:         409
1841:       );
1842:     }
1843: 
1844:     const url = new URL(request.url);
1845:     const includePatch = parseBooleanQueryParam(url, 'include_patch');
1846:     const maxBytes = parseMaxBytes(url, 'max_bytes', DEFAULT_DIFF_MAX_BYTES, MAX_DIFF_MAX_BYTES);
1847:     const sandbox = await getWorkspaceSandbox(env, workspace.sandboxId);
1848:     const hasHead = await workspaceHasGitHead(sandbox);
1849:     if (!hasHead) {
1850:       return jsonResponse(
1851:         {
1852:           error: 'Workspace git baseline is missing. Run workspace reset to rebuild baseline before requesting diff.',
1853:           status: workspace.status,
1854:         },
1855:         409
1856:       );
1857:     }
1858: 
1859:     const nameStatusOutput = await runWorkspaceDiffAgainstHead(sandbox, '--name-status -z', maxBytes + 1);
1860:     const nameStatusBytes = new TextEncoder().encode(nameStatusOutput).byteLength;
1861:     const nameStatusLikelyTruncated = nameStatusBytes > maxBytes;
1862:     const safeNameStatusOutput = trimNameStatusToCompleteRecords(nameStatusOutput);
1863:     const changedFiles = parseDiffNameStatus(safeNameStatusOutput);
1864: 
1865:     const summary = {
1866:       added: changedFiles.filter((file) => file.status === 'added').length,
1867:       modified: changedFiles.filter((file) => file.status === 'modified').length,
1868:       deleted: changedFiles.filter((file) => file.status === 'deleted').length,
1869:       renamed: changedFiles.filter((file) => file.status === 'renamed').length,
1870:       totalChanged: changedFiles.length,
1871:     };
1872: 
1873:     const truncatedChangedFiles = truncateChangedFilesByBytes(changedFiles, maxBytes);
1874: 
1875:     const response: Record<string, unknown> = {
1876:       workspaceId,
1877:       includePatch,
1878:       maxBytes,
1879:       truncated: nameStatusLikelyTruncated || truncatedChangedFiles.truncated,
1880:       changedFilesTruncated: nameStatusLikelyTruncated || truncatedChangedFiles.truncated,
1881:       summary,
1882:       summaryIsPartial: nameStatusLikelyTruncated,
1883:       changedFiles: truncatedChangedFiles.files,
1884:       changedFilesBytes: truncatedChangedFiles.bytes,
1885:       changedFilesTotalBytes: truncatedChangedFiles.totalBytes,
1886:     };
1887: 
1888:     if (includePatch) {
1889:       const patchOutput = await runWorkspaceDiffAgainstHead(sandbox, '', maxBytes + 1);
1890:       const truncatedPatch = truncateUtf8(patchOutput, maxBytes);
1891:       response.patch = truncatedPatch.content;
1892:       response.patchTruncated = truncatedPatch.truncated;
1893:       response.truncated = Boolean(response.truncated) || truncatedPatch.truncated;
1894:       response.patchBytes = truncatedPatch.returnedBytes;
1895:       if (!truncatedPatch.truncated) {
1896:         response.patchTotalBytes = truncatedPatch.totalBytes;
1897:       }
1898:     }
1899: 
1900:     return jsonResponse(response);
1901:   } catch (error) {
1902:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
1903:     return jsonResponse({ error: message }, 500);
1904:   }
1905: }

1957: export async function handleListWorkspaceArtifacts(workspaceId: string, env: Env): Promise<Response> {
1958:   try {
1959:     const workspace = await resolveWorkspaceOr404(env, workspaceId);
1960:     if (!workspace) {
1961:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace not found' }, 404);
1962:     }
1963: 
1964:     const now = new Date();
1965:     const downloadWindowMs = 15 * 60 * 1000;
1966:     const downloadSecret = getArtifactDownloadSecret(env);
1967:     const artifacts = await listWorkspaceArtifacts(env.DB, workspaceId, 100);
1968:     const normalized = await Promise.all(
1969:       artifacts.map(async (artifact) => {
1970:         const expired = artifact.expiresAt <= now.toISOString();
1971:         if (expired || !downloadSecret) {
1972:           return {
1973:             ...artifact,
1974:             status: expired ? 'expired' : artifact.status,
1975:             download: null,
1976:           };
1977:         }
1978: 
1979:         const expiresAtEpochSec = Math.floor(
1980:           Math.min(Date.parse(artifact.expiresAt), now.getTime() + downloadWindowMs) / 1000
1981:         );
1982:         const signature = await signArtifactDownload(workspaceId, artifact.id, expiresAtEpochSec, downloadSecret);
1983:         return {
1984:           ...artifact,
1985:           status: artifact.status,
1986:           download: {
1987:             url: `/api/workspaces/${workspaceId}/artifacts/${artifact.id}/download?exp=${expiresAtEpochSec}&sig=${encodeURIComponent(
1988:               signature
1989:             )}`,
1990:             expiresAt: new Date(expiresAtEpochSec * 1000).toISOString(),
1991:           },
1992:         };
1993:       })
1994:     );
1995: 
1996:     return jsonResponse({ artifacts: normalized });
1997:   } catch (error) {
1998:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
1999:     return jsonResponse({ error: message }, 500);
2000:   }
2001: }

2003: export async function handleDownloadWorkspaceArtifact(
2004:   workspaceId: string,
2005:   artifactId: string,
2006:   request: Request,
2007:   env: Env
2008: ): Promise<Response> {
2009:   try {
2010:     const workspace = await resolveWorkspaceOr404(env, workspaceId);
2011:     if (!workspace) {
2012:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace not found' }, 404);
2013:     }
2014: 
2015:     const artifact = await getWorkspaceArtifactById(env.DB, workspaceId, artifactId);
2016:     if (!artifact) {
2017:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Artifact not found' }, 404);
2018:     }
2019: 
2020:     const downloadSecret = getArtifactDownloadSecret(env);
2021:     if (!downloadSecret) {
2022:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Artifact download signing is not configured' }, 500);
2023:     }
2024: 
2025:     const url = new URL(request.url);
2026:     const expRaw = url.searchParams.get('exp');
2027:     const sigRaw = url.searchParams.get('sig');
2028:     const exp = expRaw ? Number(expRaw) : NaN;
2029:     if (!Number.isFinite(exp) || !sigRaw) {
2030:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Missing or invalid download signature' }, 403);
2031:     }
2032: 
2033:     const nowEpochSec = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);
2034:     if (exp < nowEpochSec) {
2035:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Download signature expired' }, 403);
2036:     }
2037: 
2038:     const expectedSig = await signArtifactDownload(workspaceId, artifactId, exp, downloadSecret);
2039:     if (sigRaw !== expectedSig) {
2040:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Download signature invalid' }, 403);
2041:     }
2042: 
2043:     const nowIso = new Date().toISOString();
2044:     if (artifact.retentionExpiresAt <= nowIso || artifact.status === 'expired') {
2045:       return jsonResponse(
2046:         {
2047:           error: {
2048:             code: 'artifact_expired',
2049:             message: 'Artifact has expired. Regenerate using the export endpoint with a new idempotency key.',
2050:           },
2051:         },
2052:         410
2053:       );
2054:     }
2055: 
2056:     const artifactsBucket = getArtifactsBucket(env);
2057:     if (!artifactsBucket) {
2058:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Artifact bucket is not configured' }, 500);
2059:     }
2060: 
2061:     const object = await artifactsBucket.get(artifact.objectKey);
2062:     if (!object || !object.body) {
2063:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Artifact object not found' }, 404);
2064:     }
2065: 
2066:     const extension = artifact.artifact.type === 'zip' ? 'zip' : 'patch';
2067:     const filename = `${artifact.artifact.id}.${extension}`;
2068:     return new Response(object.body, {
2069:       status: 200,
2070:       headers: {
2071:         ...corsHeaders,
2072:         'Content-Type': artifact.contentType,
2073:         'Content-Disposition': `attachment; filename="${filename}"`,
2074:       },
2075:     });
2076:   } catch (error) {
2077:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
2078:     return jsonResponse({ error: message }, 500);
2079:   }
2080: }

2107: export async function handleResetWorkspace(workspaceId: string, env: Env): Promise<Response> {
2108:   if (!env.SOURCE_BUNDLES) {
2109:     return jsonResponse({ error: 'SOURCE_BUNDLES R2 binding is not configured' }, 500);
2110:   }
2111: 
2112:   let workspaceReadyPersisted = false;
2113:   let originalWorkspace: WorkspaceResponse | null = null;
2114:   let baselineReady = true;
2115: 
2116:   try {
2117:     const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
2118:     if (!workspace) {
2119:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace not found' }, 404);
2120:     }
2121:     originalWorkspace = workspace;
2122: 
2123:     if (workspace.status === 'deleted') {
2124:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace has been deleted' }, 409);
2125:     }
2126: 
2127:     const bundle = await env.SOURCE_BUNDLES.get(workspace.sourceBundleKey);
2128:     if (!bundle) {
2129:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace source bundle not found' }, 404);
2130:     }
2131: 
2132:     const sourceBytes = await bundle.arrayBuffer();
2133:     const sourceHash = await sha256Hex(sourceBytes);
2134:     if (sourceHash !== workspace.sourceBundleSha256) {
2135:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace source bundle checksum mismatch' }, 500);
2136:     }
2137: 
2138:     await appendWorkspaceEvent(env.DB, {
2139:       workspaceId,
2140:       eventType: 'workspace_reset_started',
2141:       payload: {},
2142:     });
2143: 
2144:     await hydrateWorkspaceFilesystem(env, workspace.sandboxId, sourceBytes);
2145:     const workspaceSandbox = await getWorkspaceSandbox(env, workspace.sandboxId);
2146:     try {
2147:       await ensureWorkspaceGitBaseline(workspaceSandbox);
2148:     } catch (error) {
2149:       baselineReady = false;
2150:       const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
2151:       try {
2152:         await appendWorkspaceEvent(env.DB, {
2153:           workspaceId,
2154:           eventType: 'workspace_git_baseline_failed',
2155:           payload: { message },
2156:         });
2157:       } catch {
2158:         // Best-effort event only.
2159:       }
2160:     }
2161:     const markedReady = await markWorkspaceReady(env.DB, workspaceId, baselineReady);
2162:     if (!markedReady) {
2163:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace can no longer transition to ready (likely deleted)' }, 409);
2164:     }
2165:     workspaceReadyPersisted = true;
2166: 
2167:     await appendWorkspaceEvent(env.DB, {
2168:       workspaceId,
2169:       eventType: 'workspace_reset_completed',
2170:       payload: {},
2171:     });
2172: 
2173:     const refreshed = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
2174:     return jsonResponse({ workspace: refreshed });
2175:   } catch (error) {
2176:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
2177: 
2178:     if (workspaceReadyPersisted) {
2179:       try {
2180:         const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
2181:         if (workspace) {
2182:           return jsonResponse({ workspace });
2183:         }
2184:       } catch {
2185:         // Best-effort readback only.
2186:       }
2187: 
2188:       if (originalWorkspace) {
2189:         const fallbackWorkspace: WorkspaceResponse = {
2190:           ...originalWorkspace,
2191:           status: 'ready',
2192:           baselineReady,
2193:           errorCode: null,
2194:           errorMessage: null,
2195:           updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
2196:         };
2197:         return jsonResponse({ workspace: fallbackWorkspace, warning: `Post-ready reset bookkeeping failed: ${message}` });
2198:       }
2199: 
2200:       return jsonResponse({ error: `Reset reached ready state but result could not be loaded: ${message}` }, 500);
2201:     }
2202: 
2203:     try {
2204:       const markedFailed = await markWorkspaceFailed(env.DB, workspaceId, message, 'workspace_reset_failed');
2205:       if (!markedFailed) {
2206:         return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace reset failed after workspace was deleted' }, 409);
2207:       }
2208:       await appendWorkspaceEvent(env.DB, {
2209:         workspaceId,
2210:         eventType: 'workspace_reset_failed',
2211:         payload: { message },
2212:       });
2213:     } catch {
2214:       // Best-effort failure state update.
2215:     }
2216: 
2217:     return jsonResponse({ error: `Failed to reset workspace: ${message}` }, 500);
2218:   }
2219: }

2221: export async function handleDeleteWorkspace(workspaceId: string, env: Env): Promise<Response> {
2222:   try {
2223:     const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
2224:     if (!workspace) {
2225:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace not found' }, 404);
2226:     }
2227:

660: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentPreflight(
661:   env: Env,

670:   if (!workspace || workspace.status !== 'ready') {

672:     return { ok: false, checks };
673:   }
674:   checks.push({ code: 'workspace_ready', ok: true });

681:     checks.push({ code: 'git_baseline', ok: false, details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error) });
682:     return { ok: false, checks };

685:   const scripts = await detectPackageScripts(sandbox);
686:   checks.push({
687:     code: 'detected_scripts',

689:     details: JSON.stringify({ hasBuild: scripts.hasBuild, hasTest: scripts.hasTest }),
690:   });

692:   const secrets = await detectPotentialSecrets(sandbox);
693:   if (secrets.length > 0) {
694:     checks.push({ code: 'secret_scan', ok: false, details: secrets.join(', ') });
695:     return { ok: false, checks };
696:   }
697:   checks.push({ code: 'secret_scan', ok: true });

699:   const runBuildIfPresent = parseBoolean(options?.runBuildIfPresent, true);
700:   const runTestsIfPresent = parseBoolean(options?.runTestsIfPresent, true);
701:   if ((runBuildIfPresent && scripts.hasBuild) || (runTestsIfPresent && scripts.hasTest)) {
702:     const npmCheck = await sandbox.exec('command -v npm >/dev/null 2>&1');

704:       checks.push({ code: 'validation_tooling', ok: false, details: 'npm is not available in sandbox runtime' });
705:       return { ok: false, checks };
706:     }
707:   }
708:   checks.push({ code: 'validation_tooling', ok: true });

713: export async function processWorkspaceDeployment(env: Env, workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string): Promise<void> {
714:   const claimed = await claimWorkspaceDeploymentForExecution(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
715:   if (!claimed) {
716:     const existing = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
717:     if (existing && existing.status !== 'queued' && existing.status !== 'running') {
718:       try {
719:         await reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
720:       } catch (reconcileError) {
721:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
722:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
723:         }
724:       }
725:       return;
726:     }
727: 
728:     if (existing?.status === 'queued' && existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
729:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
730:       return;
731:     }
732: 
733:     if (existing?.status === 'running') {
734:       if (existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
735:         await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
736:         return;
737:       }
738: 
739:       if (isRunningDeploymentStale(existing.startedAt)) {
740:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
741:           workspaceId,
742:           errorCode: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
743:           errorMessage: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
744:         });
745:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
746:           workspaceId,
747:           deploymentId,
748:           eventType: 'deployment_failed',
749:           payload: {
750:             code: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
751:             message: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
752:           },
753:         });
754:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
755:           deploymentId,
756:           status: 'failed',
757:           errorCode: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
758:           errorMessage: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
759:         });
760:         return;
761:       }
762: 
763:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment is already running; defer redelivery');
764:     }
765:     return;
766:   }
767: 
768:   try {
769:     const flags = await loadRuntimeFlags(env);
770:     if (!flags.workspaceDeployEnabled) {
771:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
772:         workspaceId,
773:         errorCode: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
774:         errorMessage: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
775:       });
776:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
777:         workspaceId,
778:         deploymentId,
779:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
780:         payload: { code: 'workspace_deploy_disabled', message: 'Workspace deploy is disabled' },
781:       });
782:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
783:         deploymentId,
784:         status: 'failed',
785:         errorCode: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
786:         errorMessage: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
787:       });
788:       return;
789:     }
790: 
791:     await executeWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
792:   } catch (error) {
793:     const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
794:     if (deployment && deployment.status !== 'queued' && deployment.status !== 'running') {
795:       try {
796:         await reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
797:       } catch (reconcileError) {
798:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
799:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
800:         }
801:       }
802:       return;
803:     }
804: 
805:     if (error instanceof CancelRequestedError || deployment?.cancelRequestedAt) {
806:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
807:       return;
808:     }
809: 
810:     if (error instanceof PolicyError) {
811:       const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(
812:         (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId))?.rollbackOnFailure,
813:         true
814:       );
815:       const rollback = await resolveRollbackContextSafely(workspaceId, deploymentId, rollbackOnFailure, env);
816: 
817:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
818:         workspaceId,
819:         errorCode: error.code,
820:         errorMessage: error.message,
821:         result: { rollback },
822:       });
823:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
824:         workspaceId,
825:         deploymentId,
826:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
827:         payload: { code: error.code, message: error.message, rollback },
828:       });
829:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
830:         deploymentId,
831:         status: 'failed',
832:         errorCode: error.code,
833:         errorMessage: error.message,
834:       });
835:       return;
836:     }
837: 
838:     const attemptCount = deployment?.attemptCount ?? 0;
839:     const maxRetries = deployment?.maxRetries ?? 0;
840:     if ((error instanceof QueueRetryError || isTransientFailure(error)) && attemptCount <= maxRetries) {
841:       const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
842:       if (latest?.cancelRequestedAt) {
843:         await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');

845:       }
846: 
847:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'queued', {
848:         workspaceId,
849:         startedAt: null,
850:         finishedAt: null,
851:         errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
852:         errorMessage: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
853:       });
854:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
855:         workspaceId,
856:         deploymentId,
857:         eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
858:         payload: { attemptCount, maxRetries },
859:       });
860:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment transient failure; retry requested');
861:     }
862: 
863:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
864:     const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(
865:       (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId))?.rollbackOnFailure,
866:       true
867:     );
868:     const rollback = await resolveRollbackContextSafely(workspaceId, deploymentId, rollbackOnFailure, env);
869: 
870:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
871:       workspaceId,
872:       errorCode: 'deployment_failed',
873:       errorMessage: message,
874:       result: { rollback },
875:     });
876:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
877:       workspaceId,
878:       deploymentId,
879:       eventType: 'deployment_failed',
880:       payload: {
881:         code: 'deployment_failed',
882:         message,
883:         rollback,
884:       },
885:     });
886:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
887:       deploymentId,
888:       status: 'failed',
889:       errorCode: 'deployment_failed',
890:       errorMessage: message,
891:     });
892:   }
893: }

895: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries(
896:   env: Env,
897:   workspaceId: string,
898:   deploymentId: string,
899:   maxCycles = 8
900: ): Promise<void> {
901:   async function recoverInlineRunningDeployment(): Promise<boolean> {
902:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
903:     if (!latest || latest.status !== 'running') {
904:       return false;
905:     }
906: 
907:     if (latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
908:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
909:       return true;
910:     }
911: 
912:     if (latest.attemptCount > latest.maxRetries) {
913:       return false;
914:     }
915: 
916:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'queued', {
917:       workspaceId,
918:       startedAt: null,
919:       finishedAt: null,
920:       errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
921:       errorMessage: 'Recovered inline deployment retry after transient failure',
922:     });
923:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
924:       workspaceId,
925:       deploymentId,
926:       eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
927:       payload: { attemptCount: latest.attemptCount, maxRetries: latest.maxRetries, recoveredInline: true },
928:     });
929:     return true;
930:   }
931: 
932:   for (let cycle = 0; cycle < maxCycles; cycle += 1) {
933:     let retryableErrorRaised = false;
934:     try {
935:       await processWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
936:     } catch (error) {
937:       if (error instanceof QueueRetryError && /already running; defer redelivery/i.test(error.message)) {
938:         try {
939:           const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
940:           if (latest?.status === 'running' && latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
941:             await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
942:             continue;
943:           }
944:         } catch {
945:           // Best-effort inline recovery only.
946:         }
947:         return;
948:       }
949: 
950:       if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(error)) {
951:         retryableErrorRaised = true;
952:         try {
953:           const recovered = await recoverInlineRunningDeployment();
954:           if (recovered) {
955:             continue;
956:           }
957:         } catch {
958:           // Best-effort inline recovery only.
959:         }
960:       }
961:     }
962: 
963:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
964:     if (!latest) {
965:       return;
966:     }
967:     if (latest.status !== 'queued') {
968:       return;
969:     }
970:     if (retryableErrorRaised) {
971:       continue;
972:     }
973:     if (latest.error?.code !== 'retry_scheduled') {
974:       return;
975:     }
976:   }
977: }

979: export async function cancelWorkspaceDeployment(
980:   env: Env,
981:   workspaceId: string,
982:   deploymentId: string
983: ): Promise<{ updated: boolean; deployment: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getWorkspaceDeployment>> }> {
984:   const result = await requestWorkspaceDeploymentCancel(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
985:   if (result.updated && result.deployment?.status === 'cancelled') {
986:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
987:       workspaceId,
988:       deploymentId,
989:       eventType: 'deployment_cancelled',
990:       payload: { reason: 'cancel_requested' },
991:     });
992:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
993:       deploymentId,
994:       status: 'cancelled',
995:       errorCode: null,
996:       errorMessage: null,
997:     });
998:   }
999:   if (result.updated && result.deployment?.status === 'running') {
1000:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1001:       workspaceId,
1002:       deploymentId,
1003:       eventType: 'deployment_cancel_requested',
1004:       payload: { cancelRequestedAt: result.deployment.cancelRequestedAt },
1005:     });
1006:   }
1007:   return result;
1008: }
1009: 
1010: export function shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(error: unknown): boolean {
1011:   if (error instanceof QueueRetryError) {
1012:     return true;
1013:   }
1014:   if (isTransientFailure(error)) {
1015:     return true;
1016:   }
1017: 
1018:   const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
1019:   return /(d1|database is locked|sqlite_busy|temporarily unavailable|connection reset)/i.test(message);
1020: }

<content>1: import type { Env, RuntimeFlags } from '../types.js';
2: 
3: export interface RuntimeFlagRow {
4:   key: string;
5:   value: string;
6: }
7: 
8: export const DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS: RuntimeFlags = {
9:   v2Enabled: false,
10:   v2CodeBrowserEnabled: false,
11:   maxAttempts: 3,
12:   attemptTimeoutMs: 600000,
13:   totalTimeoutMs: 1800000,
14:   idempotencyTtlHours: 24,
15:   maxRepairCycles: 2,
16:   lintBlocking: false,
17:   testBlocking: true,
18:   safeInstallIgnoreScripts: true,
19:   autoInstallScriptsFallback: true,
20:   rawRetentionDays: 30,
21:   summaryRetentionDays: 180,
22:   workspaceAgentRuntimeEnabled: false,
23:   workspaceDeployEnabled: false,
24: };
25: 
26: function parseBoolean(value: string | undefined, fallback: boolean): boolean {
27:   if (value === undefined) {
28:     return fallback;
29:   }
30: 
31:   const normalized = value.trim().toLowerCase();
32: 
33:   if (normalized === 'true' || normalized === '1' || normalized === 'yes' || normalized === 'on') {
34:     return true;
35:   }
36: 
37:   if (normalized === 'false' || normalized === '0' || normalized === 'no' || normalized === 'off') {
38:     return false;
39:   }
40: 
41:   return fallback;
42: }
43: 
44: function parseInteger(
45:   value: string | undefined,
46:   fallback: number,
47:   options?: { min?: number; max?: number }
48: ): number {
49:   if (value === undefined) {
50:     return fallback;
51:   }
52: 
53:   const parsed = Number.parseInt(value.trim(), 10);
54:   if (Number.isNaN(parsed)) {
55:     return fallback;
56:   }
57: 
58:   if (options?.min !== undefined && parsed < options.min) {
59:     return options.min;
60:   }
61: 
62:   if (options?.max !== undefined && parsed > options.max) {
63:     return options.max;
64:   }
65: 
66:   return parsed;
67: }
68: 
69: function normalizeRuntimeFlags(flags: RuntimeFlags): RuntimeFlags {
70:   return {
71:     ...flags,
72:     totalTimeoutMs: Math.max(flags.totalTimeoutMs, flags.attemptTimeoutMs),
73:   };
74: }
75: 
76: export function getRuntimeFlagsFromEnv(env: Env): RuntimeFlags {
77:   const resolved: RuntimeFlags = {
78:     v2Enabled: parseBoolean(env.V2_ENABLED, DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.v2Enabled),
79:     v2CodeBrowserEnabled: parseBoolean(
80:       env.V2_CODE_BROWSER_ENABLED,
81:       DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.v2CodeBrowserEnabled
82:     ),
83:     maxAttempts: parseInteger(env.MAX_ATTEMPTS, DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.maxAttempts, { min: 1, max: 10 }),
84:     attemptTimeoutMs: parseInteger(
85:       env.ATTEMPT_TIMEOUT_MS,
86:       DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.attemptTimeoutMs,
87:       { min: 60000 }
88:     ),
89:     totalTimeoutMs: parseInteger(env.TOTAL_TIMEOUT_MS, DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.totalTimeoutMs, {
90:       min: 60000,
91:     }),
92:     idempotencyTtlHours: parseInteger(
93:       env.IDEMPOTENCY_TTL_HOURS,
94:       DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.idempotencyTtlHours,
95:       { min: 1, max: 168 }
96:     ),
97:     maxRepairCycles: parseInteger(
98:       env.MAX_REPAIR_CYCLES,
99:       DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.maxRepairCycles,
100:       { min: 0, max: 10 }
101:     ),
102:     lintBlocking: parseBoolean(env.LINT_BLOCKING, DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.lintBlocking),
103:     testBlocking: parseBoolean(env.TEST_BLOCKING, DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.testBlocking),
104:     safeInstallIgnoreScripts: parseBoolean(
105:       env.SAFE_INSTALL_IGNORE_SCRIPTS,
106:       DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.safeInstallIgnoreScripts
107:     ),
108:     autoInstallScriptsFallback: parseBoolean(
109:       env.AUTO_INSTALL_SCRIPTS_FALLBACK,
110:       DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.autoInstallScriptsFallback
111:     ),
112:     rawRetentionDays: parseInteger(
113:       env.RAW_RETENTION_DAYS,
114:       DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.rawRetentionDays,
115:       { min: 1 }
116:     ),
117:     summaryRetentionDays: parseInteger(
118:       env.SUMMARY_RETENTION_DAYS,
119:       DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.summaryRetentionDays,
120:       { min: 1 }
121:     ),
122:     workspaceAgentRuntimeEnabled: parseBoolean(
123:       env.WORKSPACE_AGENT_RUNTIME_ENABLED,
124:       DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.workspaceAgentRuntimeEnabled
125:     ),
126:     workspaceDeployEnabled: parseBoolean(env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_ENABLED, DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.workspaceDeployEnabled),
127:   };
128: 
129:   return normalizeRuntimeFlags(resolved);
130: }
131: 
132: export function mergeRuntimeFlagOverrides(
133:   base: RuntimeFlags,
134:   rows: RuntimeFlagRow[]
135: ): RuntimeFlags {
136:   const merged: RuntimeFlags = { ...base };
137: 
138:   for (const row of rows) {
139:     switch (row.key) {
140:       case 'v2_enabled':
141:         merged.v2Enabled = parseBoolean(row.value, merged.v2Enabled);
142:         break;
143:       case 'v2_code_browser_enabled':
144:         merged.v2CodeBrowserEnabled = parseBoolean(row.value, merged.v2CodeBrowserEnabled);
145:         break;
146:       case 'max_attempts':
147:         merged.maxAttempts = parseInteger(row.value, merged.maxAttempts, { min: 1, max: 10 });
148:         break;
149:       case 'attempt_timeout_ms':
150:         merged.attemptTimeoutMs = parseInteger(row.value, merged.attemptTimeoutMs, { min: 60000 });
151:         break;
152:       case 'total_timeout_ms':
153:         merged.totalTimeoutMs = parseInteger(row.value, merged.totalTimeoutMs, { min: 60000 });
154:         break;
155:       case 'idempotency_ttl_hours':
156:         merged.idempotencyTtlHours = parseInteger(row.value, merged.idempotencyTtlHours, {
157:           min: 1,
158:           max: 168,
159:         });
160:         break;
161:       case 'max_repair_cycles':
162:         merged.maxRepairCycles = parseInteger(row.value, merged.maxRepairCycles, {
163:           min: 0,
164:           max: 10,
165:         });
166:         break;
167:       case 'lint_blocking':
168:         merged.lintBlocking = parseBoolean(row.value, merged.lintBlocking);
169:         break;
170:       case 'test_blocking':
171:         merged.testBlocking = parseBoolean(row.value, merged.testBlocking);
172:         break;
173:       case 'safe_install_ignore_scripts':
174:         merged.safeInstallIgnoreScripts = parseBoolean(row.value, merged.safeInstallIgnoreScripts);
175:         break;
176:       case 'auto_install_scripts_fallback':
177:         merged.autoInstallScriptsFallback = parseBoolean(
178:           row.value,
179:           merged.autoInstallScriptsFallback
180:         );
181:         break;
182:       case 'raw_retention_days':
183:         merged.rawRetentionDays = parseInteger(row.value, merged.rawRetentionDays, { min: 1 });
184:         break;
185:       case 'summary_retention_days':
186:         merged.summaryRetentionDays = parseInteger(row.value, merged.summaryRetentionDays, { min: 1 });
187:         break;
188:       case 'workspace_agent_runtime_enabled':
189:         merged.workspaceAgentRuntimeEnabled = parseBoolean(row.value, merged.workspaceAgentRuntimeEnabled);
190:         break;
191:       case 'workspace_deploy_enabled':
192:         merged.workspaceDeployEnabled = parseBoolean(row.value, merged.workspaceDeployEnabled);
193:         break;
194:       default:
195:         break;
196:     }
197:   }
198: 
199:   return normalizeRuntimeFlags(merged);
200: }
201: 
202: export async function loadRuntimeFlags(env: Env): Promise<RuntimeFlags> {
203:   const fromEnv = getRuntimeFlagsFromEnv(env);
204: 
205:   try {
206:     const result = await env.DB
207:       .prepare('SELECT key, value FROM runtime_flags')
208:       .all<RuntimeFlagRow>();
209: 
210:     return mergeRuntimeFlagOverrides(fromEnv, result.results);
211:   } catch (error) {
212:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
213:     console.warn(`[flags] Failed to load runtime overrides, using env defaults: ${message}`);
214:     return fromEnv;
215:   }
216: }

31:     },

33: }

1391: ): Promise<{ task: WorkspaceTaskResponse; reused: boolean }> {
1392:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
1393:   const existingIdempotency = await db
1394:     .prepare(
1395:       `SELECT task_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
1396:        FROM workspace_task_idempotency
1397:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
1398:        LIMIT 1`

1408:     const existingTask = await getWorkspaceTask(db, input.workspaceId, existingIdempotency.task_id);

1415:

1612: export async function updateWorkspaceTaskStatus(
1613:   db: D1Database,
1614:   taskId: string,
1615:   status: WorkspaceTaskStatus,
1616:   options?: {
1617:     workspaceId?: string;
1618:     result?: unknown;
1619:     errorCode?: string | null;
1620:     errorMessage?: string | null;
1621:     startedAt?: string | null;
1622:     finishedAt?: string | null;
1623:   }
1624: ): Promise<void> {
1625:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
1626:   const values: Array<string | null> = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
1627: 
1628:   if (options?.startedAt !== undefined) {
1629:     updates.push('started_at = ?');
1630:     values.push(options.startedAt);
1631:   }
1632: 
1633:   if (options?.finishedAt !== undefined) {
1634:     updates.push('finished_at = ?');
1635:     values.push(options.finishedAt);
1636:   }
1637: 
1638:   if (options?.result !== undefined) {
1639:     updates.push('result_json = ?');
1640:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.result));
1641:   }
1642: 
1643:   if (options?.errorCode !== undefined) {
1644:     updates.push('error_code = ?');
1645:     values.push(options.errorCode);
1646:   }
1647: 
1648:   if (options?.errorMessage !== undefined) {
1649:     updates.push('error_message = ?');
1650:     values.push(options.errorMessage);
1651:   }
1652: 
1653:   if (status === 'succeeded' || status === 'failed' || status === 'cancelled') {
1654:     updates.push('finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?)');
1655:     values.push(new Date().toISOString());
1656:   }
1657: 
1658:   values.push(taskId);
1659:   let whereClause = 'id = ?';
1660:   if (options?.workspaceId) {
1661:     whereClause += ' AND workspace_id = ?';
1662:     values.push(options.workspaceId);
1663:   }
1664: 
1665:   await db
1666:     .prepare(`UPDATE workspace_tasks SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE ${whereClause}`)
1667:     .bind(...values)
1668:     .run();
1669: }

1682:            finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
1683:            error_code = NULL,

1685:            updated_at = ?

2042:   db: D1Database,
2043:   deploymentId: string,
2044:   status: WorkspaceDeploymentStatus,
2045:   options?: {
2046:     workspaceId?: string;
2047:     result?: unknown;
2048:     errorCode?: string | null;
2049:     errorMessage?: string | null;
2050:     sourceSnapshotSha256?: string | null;
2051:     sourceBundleKey?: string | null;
2052:     deployedUrl?: string | null;
2053:     providerDeploymentId?: string | null;
2054:     startedAt?: string | null;
2055:     finishedAt?: string | null;
2056:   }
2057: ): Promise<void> {
2058:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
2059:   const values: Array<string | null> = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
2060:   let explicitFinishedAt: string | null | undefined;
2061: 
2062:   if (options?.startedAt !== undefined) {
2063:     updates.push('started_at = ?');
2064:     values.push(options.startedAt);
2065:   }
2066:   if (options?.finishedAt !== undefined) {
2067:     updates.push('finished_at = ?');
2068:     values.push(options.finishedAt);
2069:     explicitFinishedAt = options.finishedAt;
2070:   }
2071:   if (options?.result !== undefined) {
2072:     updates.push('result_json = ?');
2073:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.result));
2074:   }
2075:   if (options?.errorCode !== undefined) {
2076:     updates.push('error_code = ?');
2077:     values.push(options.errorCode);
2078:   }
2079:   if (options?.errorMessage !== undefined) {
2080:     updates.push('error_message = ?');
2081:     values.push(options.errorMessage);
2082:   }
2083:   if (options?.sourceSnapshotSha256 !== undefined) {
2084:     updates.push('source_snapshot_sha256 = ?');
2085:     values.push(options.sourceSnapshotSha256);
2086:   }
2087:   if (options?.sourceBundleKey !== undefined) {
2088:     updates.push('source_bundle_key = ?');
2089:     values.push(options.sourceBundleKey);
2090:   }
2091:   if (options?.deployedUrl !== undefined) {
2092:     updates.push('deployed_url = ?');
2093:     values.push(options.deployedUrl);
2094:   }
2095:   if (options?.providerDeploymentId !== undefined) {
2096:     updates.push('provider_deployment_id = ?');
2097:     values.push(options.providerDeploymentId);
2098:   }
2099: 
2100:   if (status === 'succeeded' || status === 'failed' || status === 'cancelled') {
2101:     const finishedAtForDuration =
2102:       explicitFinishedAt && typeof explicitFinishedAt === 'string' ? explicitFinishedAt : new Date().toISOString();
2103:     if (explicitFinishedAt === undefined) {
2104:       updates.push('finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?)');
2105:       values.push(finishedAtForDuration);
2106:     }
2107:     updates.push('duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(?) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END');
2108:     values.push(finishedAtForDuration);
2109:   }
2110: 
2111:   values.push(deploymentId);
2112:   let whereClause = 'id = ?';
2113:   if (options?.workspaceId) {
2114:     whereClause += ' AND workspace_id = ?';
2115:     values.push(options.workspaceId);
2116:   }
2117: 
2118:   await db
2119:     .prepare(`UPDATE workspace_deployments SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE ${whereClause}`)
2120:     .bind(...values)
2121:     .run();
2122: }
2123: 
2124: export async function markWorkspaceDeploymentSucceededIfNotCancelled(
2125:   db: D1Database,
2126:   input: {
2127:     workspaceId: string;
2128:     deploymentId: string;
2129:     sourceSnapshotSha256: string;
2130:     sourceBundleKey: string;
2131:     deployedUrl: string;
2132:     providerDeploymentId: string;
2133:     result: unknown;
2134:     finishedAt: string;
2135:   }
2136: ): Promise<boolean> {
2137:   const updatedAt = new Date().toISOString();
2138:   const result = await db
2139:     .prepare(
2140:       `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2141:        SET status = 'succeeded',
2142:            source_snapshot_sha256 = ?,
2143:            source_bundle_key = ?,
2144:            deployed_url = ?,
2145:            provider_deployment_id = ?,
2146:            result_json = ?,
2147:            error_code = NULL,
2148:            error_message = NULL,
2149:            finished_at = ?,
2150:            duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(?) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END,
2151:            updated_at = ?
2152:        WHERE id = ?
2153:          AND workspace_id = ?
2154:          AND status = 'running'
2155:          AND cancel_requested_at IS NULL`
2156:     )
2157:     .bind(
2158:       input.sourceSnapshotSha256,
2159:       input.sourceBundleKey,
2160:       input.deployedUrl,
2161:       input.providerDeploymentId,
2162:       JSON.stringify(input.result),
2163:       input.finishedAt,
2164:       input.finishedAt,
2165:       updatedAt,
2166:       input.deploymentId,
2167:       input.workspaceId
2168:     )
2169:     .run();
2170: 
2171:   return (result.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0;
2172: }
2173: 
2174: export async function requestWorkspaceDeploymentCancel(
2175:   db: D1Database,
2176:   workspaceId: string,
2177:   deploymentId: string
2178: ): Promise<{ deployment: WorkspaceDeploymentResponse | null; updated: boolean }> {
2179:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
2180:   const queuedResult = await db
2181:     .prepare(
2182:       `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2183:        SET status = 'cancelled',
2184:            cancel_requested_at = COALESCE(cancel_requested_at, ?),
2185:            finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
2186:            error_code = NULL,
2187:            error_message = NULL,
2188:            updated_at = ?
2189:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
2190:     )
2191:     .bind(now, now, now, deploymentId, workspaceId)
2192:     .run();
2193: 
2194:   const runningResult = await db
2195:     .prepare(
2196:       `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2197:        SET cancel_requested_at = COALESCE(cancel_requested_at, ?),
2198:            updated_at = ?
2199:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'running' AND cancel_requested_at IS NULL`
2200:     )
2201:     .bind(now, now, deploymentId, workspaceId)
2202:     .run();
2203: 
2204:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(db, workspaceId, deploymentId);
2205: 
2206:   return {
2207:     deployment,
2208:     updated: (queuedResult.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0 || (runningResult.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0,
2209:   };
2210: }
2211: 
2212: export async function appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
2213:   db: D1Database,
2214:   input: {
2215:     workspaceId: string;
2216:     deploymentId: string;
2217:     eventType: string;
2218:     payload: unknown;
2219:   }
2220: ): Promise<number> {
2221:   const seqResult = await db
2222:     .prepare(
2223:       'UPDATE workspace_deployments SET last_event_seq = last_event_seq + 1 WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? RETURNING last_event_seq'
2224:     )
2225:     .bind(input.deploymentId, input.workspaceId)
2226:     .first<{ last_event_seq: number }>();
2227: 
2228:   if (!seqResult) {
2229:     throw new Error(`Failed to allocate event sequence for workspace deployment ${input.deploymentId}`);
2230:   }
2231: 
2232:   const seq = Number(seqResult.last_event_seq);
2233:   await db
2234:     .prepare(
2235:       `INSERT INTO workspace_deployment_events (workspace_id, deployment_id, seq, event_type, payload_json)
2236:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
2237:     )
2238:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.deploymentId, seq, input.eventType, JSON.stringify(input.payload))
2239:     .run();
2240: 
2241:   return seq;
2242: }
2243: 
2244: export async function listWorkspaceDeploymentEvents(
2245:   db: D1Database,
2246:   workspaceId: string,
2247:   deploymentId: string,
2248:   fromExclusive = 0,
2249:   limit = 500
2250: ): Promise<WorkspaceDeploymentEventItem[]> {
2251:   const result = await db
2252:     .prepare(
2253:       `SELECT seq, event_type, payload_json, created_at
2254:        FROM workspace_deployment_events
2255:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND deployment_id = ? AND seq > ?
2256:        ORDER BY seq ASC
2257:        LIMIT ?`
2258:     )
2259:     .bind(workspaceId, deploymentId, fromExclusive, limit)
2260:     .all<WorkspaceDeploymentEventRecord>();
2261: 
2262:   return result.results.map((row) => {
2263:     let payload: unknown;
2264:     try {
2265:       payload = JSON.parse(row.payload_json);
2266:     } catch {
2267:       payload = { raw: row.payload_json };
2268:     }
2269: 
2270:     return {
2271:       seq: row.seq,
2272:       eventType: row.event_type,
2273:       payload,
2274:       createdAt: row.created_at,
2275:     };
2276:   });
2277: }
2278: 
2279: export async function hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
2280:   db: D1Database,
2281:   workspaceId: string,
2282:   deploymentId: string,
2283:   eventType: string
2284: ): Promise<boolean> {
2285:   const record = await db
2286:     .prepare(
2287:       `SELECT 1
2288:        FROM workspace_deployment_events
2289:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND deployment_id = ? AND event_type = ?
2290:        LIMIT 1`
2291:     )
2292:     .bind(workspaceId, deploymentId, eventType)
2293:     .first<{ '1': number }>();
2294: 
2295:   return Boolean(record);
2296: }
2297: 
2298: export async function getLatestSuccessfulWorkspaceDeployment(
2299:   db: D1Database,
2300:   workspaceId: string
2301: ): Promise<WorkspaceDeploymentResponse | null> {
2302:   const record = await db
2303:     .prepare(
2304:       `SELECT *
2305:        FROM workspace_deployments
2306:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND status = 'succeeded'
2307:        ORDER BY julianday(created_at) DESC, rowid DESC
2308:        LIMIT 1`
2309:     )
2310:     .bind(workspaceId)
2311:     .first<WorkspaceDeploymentRecord>();
2312: 
2313:   if (!record) {
2314:     return null;
2315:   }
2316: 
2317:   return toWorkspaceDeploymentResponse(record);
2318: }
2319: 
2320: export async function updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(
2321:   db: D1Database,
2322:   workspaceId: string,
2323:   input: {
2324:     deploymentId: string;
2325:     status: WorkspaceDeploymentStatus;
2326:     deployedUrl?: string | null;
2327:     deployedAt?: string | null;
2328:     errorCode?: string | null;
2329:     errorMessage?: string | null;
2330:   }
2331: ): Promise<void> {
2332:   const updates: string[] = [
2333:     'last_deployment_id = ?',
2334:     'last_deployment_status = ?',
2335:     'last_deployment_error_code = ?',
2336:     'last_deployment_error_message = ?',
2337:     'updated_at = ?',
2338:   ];
2339:   const values: Array<string | null> = [
2340:     input.deploymentId,
2341:     input.status,
2342:     input.errorCode ?? null,
2343:     input.errorMessage ?? null,
2344:     new Date().toISOString(),
2345:   ];
2346: 
2347:   if (input.deployedUrl !== undefined) {
2348:     updates.push('last_deployed_url = ?');
2349:     values.push(input.deployedUrl);
2350:   }
2351:   if (input.deployedAt !== undefined) {
2352:     updates.push('last_deployed_at = ?');
2353:     values.push(input.deployedAt);
2354:   }
2355: 
2356:   values.push(workspaceId);
2357:   values.push(input.deploymentId);
2358:   await db
2359:     .prepare(
2360:       `UPDATE workspaces
2361:        SET ${updates.join(', ')}
2362:        WHERE id = ?
2363:          AND EXISTS (
2364:            SELECT 1
2365:            FROM workspace_deployments candidate
2366:            LEFT JOIN workspace_deployments current ON current.id = workspaces.last_deployment_id
2367:            WHERE candidate.id = ?
2368:              AND candidate.workspace_id = workspaces.id
2369:              AND (
2370:                workspaces.last_deployment_id IS NULL
2371:                OR current.id IS NULL
2372:                OR workspaces.last_deployment_id = candidate.id
2373:                OR julianday(candidate.created_at) > julianday(current.created_at)
2374:                OR (
2375:                  julianday(candidate.created_at) = julianday(current.created_at)
2376:                  AND (current.id IS NULL OR candidate.rowid >= current.rowid)
2377:                )
2378:              )
2379:          )`
2380:     )
2381:     .bind(...values)
2382:     .run();
2383: }

<type>file</type>
<content>1: # Nimbus
2: 
3: Nimbus is currently an experiment and active work in progress.
4: 
5: This README is intentionally minimal while the product direction settles.
6: 
7: Entire docs: [docs.entire.io/introduction](https://docs.entire.io/introduction)
8: 
9: ## Current Focus
10: 
11: The current priority is launching Entire checkpoints in a sandbox execution pipeline:
12: 
13: - Resolve an Entire checkpoint (or commit) to source
14: - Upload a source bundle to the worker
15: - Queue a background checkpoint job
16: - Run install/build/test/lint inside Cloudflare Sandbox
17: - Persist job status and replayable events
18: 
19: ## What Works Today
20: 
21: - `deploy checkpoint` dry-run resolution and preflight
22: - Live checkpoint job creation with `--no-dry-run`
23: - Queue-backed worker processing (`CHECKPOINT_JOBS_QUEUE`)
24: - Deterministic installs with lockfile enforcement
25: - `watch` polling for queued/running/completed/failed jobs
26: 
27: Entire checkpoint notes:
28: 
29: - Checkpoint IDs from commit trailers (for example `checkpoint:be1b10a00b44`) resolve and run.
30: - The worker executes install/build/test/lint in Cloudflare Sandbox for that checkpoint source.
31: 
32: ## Known Limits (Expected Right Now)
33: 
34: - No persistent preview/deployed URL for checkpoint jobs yet
35: - Checkpoint live SSE stream output in CLI is not complete yet
36: - Checkpoint install support is currently for npm/bun lockfiles (pnpm/yarn are rejected)
37: 
38: ## Quick Start (Dev)
39: 
40: From repo root:
41: 
42: ```bash
43: nvm use
44: source ~/.bash_profile
45: pnpm install
46: ```
47: 
48: Set up infra (safe to re-run):
49: 
50: ```bash
51: pnpm wrangler queues create nimbus-checkpoint-jobs
52: pnpm wrangler d1 migrations apply nimbus-db --remote
53: ```
54: 
55: Deploy worker:
56: 
57: ```bash
58: pnpm run deploy
59: ```
60: 
61: Point CLI to your worker URL:
62: 
63: ```bash
64: export NIMBUS_WORKER_URL="https://<your-worker>.workers.dev"
65: ```
66: 
67: Create and watch a live checkpoint job:
68: 
69: ```bash
70: pnpm cli -- deploy checkpoint checkpoint:be1b10a00b44 --project-root packages/worker --no-dry-run
71: pnpm cli -- watch <job_id>
72: ```
73: 
74: You can also target any commit-ish:
75: 
76: ```bash
77: pnpm cli -- deploy checkpoint HEAD --project-root packages/worker --no-dry-run
78: ```
79: 
80: ## Common Commands
81: 
82: ```bash
83: # Run worker tests
84: pnpm --filter @dayhaysoos/nimbus-worker test
85: 
86: # Run CLI tests
87: pnpm --filter @dayhaysoos/nimbus test
88: 
89: # Run worker locally
90: pnpm dev
91: ```
92: 
93: ## CLI Surface (Current)
94: 
95: ```bash
96: nimbus list
97: nimbus watch <job-id>
98: nimbus deploy checkpoint <checkpoint-id-or-commit-ish>
99: ```
100: 
101: Important checkpoint flags:
102: 
103: - `--project-root <path>`: required for many monorepos
104: - `--no-dry-run`: actually creates/queues a live job
105: - `--no-tests`, `--no-lint`: skip validation steps in metadata
106: - `--env-file`, `--env KEY=VALUE`: pass environment inputs for preflight
107: 
108: ## Notes
109: 
110: - Node 20+ is required.
111: - Nimbus currently targets self-hosted worker usage.
112: - If you hit `404` on `/api/checkpoint/jobs`, deploy the latest worker code.
113: 
114: ## License
115: 
116: MIT

(End of file - total 116 lines)
</content>

metadata.preview:
# Nimbus

Nimbus is currently an experiment and active work in progress.

This README is intentionally minimal while the product direction settles.

Entire docs: [docs.entire.io/introduction](https://docs.entire.io/introduction)

## Current Focus

The current priority is launching Entire checkpoints in a sandbox execution pipeline:

- Resolve an Entire checkpoint (or commit) to source
- Upload a source bundle to the worker
- Queue a background checkpoint job
- Run install/build/test/lint inside Cloudflare Sandbox
- Persist job status and replayable events

## What Works Today
